name: python3-gps
title: python3-gps
description:
Global Positioning System - Python 3 libraries
The gpsd service daemon can monitor one or more GPS devices connected to
a host computer, making all data on the location and movements of the
sensors available to be queried on TCP port 2947.
.
This package contains a Python 3 interface to connect to gpsd, together with
a module providing a controlled testing environment.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gps because Global Positioning System - Python 3 libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gps as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gps with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gps --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
